testsuite.name: org.bluezoo.gonzalez.JamesClarkXmlTestConformanceTest

property.name: sun.java.command
property.value: org.apache.tools.ant.taskdefs.optional.junit.JUnitTestRunner org.bluezoo.gonzalez.JamesClarkXmlTestConformanceTest skipNonTests=false filtertrace=true haltOnError=false haltOnFailure=false formatter=org.apache.tools.ant.taskdefs.optional.junit.SummaryJUnitResultFormatter showoutput=false outputtoformatters=true logfailedtests=true threadid=0 logtestlistenerevents=false formatter=org.apache.tools.ant.taskdefs.optional.junit.XMLJUnitResultFormatter,/Users/cburdess@mimecast.com/cpkb-bluezoo/gonzalez/test/junit/results/TEST-org.bluezoo.gonzalez.JamesClarkXmlTestConformanceTest.xml formatter=org.apache.tools.ant.taskdefs.optional.junit.PlainJUnitResultFormatter crashfile=/Users/cburdess@mimecast.com/cpkb-bluezoo/gonzalez/junitvmwatcher9927062513792874932.properties propsfile=/Users/cburdess@mimecast.com/cpkb-bluezoo/gonzalez/junit1224067994435867906.properties

property.name: ant.version
property.value: Apache Ant(TM) version 1.10.15 compiled on August 25 2024

testcase.name: runTest[not-wf-sa-120 (not-wf)]

failure.message: [not-wf-sa-120] Expected not-wf but parsed successfully: Character references are expanded in the replacement text of an internal entity, which is then parsed as usual. Accordingly, & must be doubly quoted - encoded either as & or as &#38;.

testcase.name: runTest[invalid--002 (invalid)]

failure.message: [invalid--002] Got fatal error instead of validation error: Empty content model () is not allowed in <!ELEMENT: Tests the "Proper Group/PE Nesting" validity constraint by fragmenting a content model between two parameter entities.

failure.message: [valid-sa-088] Expected valid but got error: End tag </doc> does not match start tag <foo>: Tests whether entity references in internal entities are expanded late enough, by relying on correct handling to make the expanded text be valid. testcase.name: runTest[valid-sa-100 (valid)]

failure.message: [valid-sa-100] Expected valid but got error: Expected quoted value, SYSTEM, or PUBLIC in <!ENTITY, got: NAME: Makes sure that PUBLIC identifiers may have some strange characters. NOTE: The XML editors have said that the XML specification errata will specify that parameter entity expansion does not occur in PUBLIC identifiers, so that the '%' character will not flag a malformed parameter entity reference.

testcase.failure: junit.framework.AssertionFailedError: [valid-sa-100] Expected valid but got error: Expected quoted value, SYSTEM, or PUBLIC in <!ENTITY, got: NAME: Makes sure that PUBLIC identifiers may have some strange characters. NOTE: The XML editors have said that the XML specification errata will specify that parameter entity expansion does not occur in PUBLIC identifiers, so that the '%' character will not flag a malformed parameter entity reference. at org.bluezoo.gonzalez.JamesClarkXmlTestConformanceTest.runTest(JamesClarkXmlTestConformanceTest.java:302) at jdk.internal.reflect.GeneratedMethodAccessor1.invoke(Unknown Source) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43)

testcase.name: runTest[valid-sa-114 (valid)]

failure.message: [valid-sa-114] Expected valid but got error: General entity reference '&foo;' used but entity not declared: Test demonstrates that all text within a valid CDATA section is considered text and not recognized as markup.

testcase.failure: junit.framework.AssertionFailedError: [valid-sa-114] Expected valid but got error: General entity reference '&foo;' used but entity not declared: Test demonstrates that all text within a valid CDATA section is considered text and not recognized as markup. at org.bluezoo.gonzalez.JamesClarkXmlTestConformanceTest.runTest(JamesClarkXmlTestConformanceTest.java:302) at jdk.internal.reflect.GeneratedMethodAccessor1.invoke(Unknown Source) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43)

failure.message: [valid-ext-sa-008] Expected valid but got error: Expected quoted value, SYSTEM, or PUBLIC in <!ENTITY, got: NAME: Test demonstrates the use of external entity and how replacement text is retrieved and processed. Also tests the use of an EncodingDecl of UTF-16.

testcase.name: runTest[valid-ext-sa-009 (valid)]

failure.message: [valid-ext-sa-009] Expected valid but got error: Expected quoted value, SYSTEM, or PUBLIC in <!ENTITY, got: NAME: A carriage return (also CRLF) in an external entity must be normalized to a single newline.

testcase.name: runTest[valid-ext-sa-011 (valid)]

failure.message: [valid-ext-sa-011] Expected valid but got error: Expected quoted value, SYSTEM, or PUBLIC in <!ENTITY, got: NAME: Test demonstrates the use of a public identifier with and external entity. The test also show that a carriage control line feed combination in an external entity must be normalized to a single newline.

failure.message: [valid-ext-sa-012] Expected valid but got error: Expected quoted value, SYSTEM, or PUBLIC in <!ENTITY, got: NAME: Test demonstrates both internal and external entities and that processing of entity references may be required to produce the correct replacement text.
